settings.title: HONORING THE LIVES THAT MATTER MOST
settings.text: A custom pencil portrait and video tribute capturing the essence, warmth, and character of your loved ones.

settings.title: SUBMIT PHOTOS
settings.description: Provide clear photographs and share details about the personality, accomplishments, and legacy of your subject.

settings.title: PENCIL PORTRAIT
settings.description: Chad Hawkins hand-draws the custom graphite portrait tribute, capturing details, expressions, and characteristics.

settings.title: TRIBUTE VIDEO
settings.description: A touching digital slideshow video showing the drawing steps, historical memories, and stories, set to music.

settings.title: FRAMING & DELIVERY
settings.description: The drawing is professionally double-matted, framed behind conservation glass, and shipped securely to your home.

settings.title: LET'S CREATE A TRIBUTE THAT WILL BE REMEMBERED.
settings.text: Whether honoring a spouse, parent, grandparent, friend, or loved one, a hand-drawn tribute portrait becomes a lasting reminder of a life that mattered.
